    MissionTypes:qpq-eu8nkkqVatcTgq_3sA

    labelThe Ultimate Poison: Part 3 (0-0)
    titleThe Ultimate Poison: Part 3
    descriptionXhargreg: ”Let’s make the perfect poison! I’m sure you don’t have anything better to do anyway. The bigger moths are bound to have more potent poisons, right? Perfect logic! I remember seeing large moths in Hozar. Go there and kill 8 Moth Alphas. Why 8 you say? Well 8 is a perfectly symmetrical number, therefore it’s the ideal choice."
    solarsystemRv0u-QG0bESaLV3ZyUj19Q
